questions.name: Java - OOP: keyword this
questions.questiontext: Complete the setAge method with one line that assigns the parameter age value to the class field age. Your answer should not contain any extra spaces.

questions.name: Java - OOP: keyword super
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code. Write one line in the Car class constructor that calls the parent class Vehicle constructor, passing the variable brand. Your answer should not contain any extra spaces.
